do: Run the beach, kill Hillock at the end
Enter Lioneye's Watch
steps.tip: Grab any 3-link that drops. Don't full-clear.

do: Turn in Enemy at the Gate → take your starter skill gem (Tarkleigh)
Exit to The Coast
Tag the waypoint on the main path
Take the seaward side exit to The Tidal Island
steps.layout: WP is roughly halfway along the path.

do: Kill Hailrake — dodge the ice spears, he hits hard early
Loot the Medicine Chest
LOGOUT to town (Esc → Exit to Login)
steps.tip: Logout warp = instant free travel to town. Core speed tech, fully allowed.

do: Turn in Mercy Mission → take the QUICKSILVER FLASK (Nessa) + gem reward (Tarkleigh)
Put Quicksilver on your bar — use it on cooldown for the rest of the game
Waypoint → The Coast
Exit north-east to The Mud Flats
Grab the 3 glyphs from the rhoa nests (marked on screen)
Open the passage and enter The Submerged Passage
steps.layout: Nests fan out left / middle / right — check the minimap arms.

do: Rush toward the far bridge — the waypoint is near it
IF you spot The Flooded Depths on the way: dip in, kill the Dweller of the Deep (+1 passive on turn-in), come back
Exit to The Ledge
Tag the waypoint mid-zone
Push through to The Climb
steps.layout: One long shelf — follow the wall in one direction.

do: Head up and through to The Lower Prison
steps.tip: Watch the ranged fire packs — they burst low-life characters.

do: Tag the waypoint
DO the Trial of Ascendancy (spike corridor) — first of six for Normal Lab
Continue to The Upper Prison
Push to Brutus and kill him — keep moving to dodge the hook slam
Continue through the gate toward Prisoner's Gate
Tag the waypoint
Exit down the slope to The Ship Graveyard
Tag the waypoint
Find The Ship Graveyard Cave → grab the Allflame inside
Kill Fairgraves outside the cave
LOGOUT to town
steps.layout: The cave sits along the outer coastline — sweep the map edge.

do: Turn in: The Caged Brute (gem rewards — movement skills unlock here for most builds), The Marooned Mariner (+1 passive, Bestel), and the Dweller if you did it (+1 passive, Tarkleigh)
Buy + socket gems per your build sheet
Waypoint → The Ship Graveyard, run to The Cavern of Wrath at the far end
Tag the waypoint at the entrance
Descend to The Cavern of Anger
Kill Merveil — two phases, heavy COLD damage
Exit through the passage behind her arena → Act 2
steps.tip: A Sapphire Ring trivializes her. Target: level 12–13 leaving Act 1.
